measurement_note: Size is N, both the row and column count of an all-one N by N matrix. The legal 5/20/80 tiers span 16x and every histogram interval remains valid. The accepted monotonic-stack algorithm runs in O(N^2) time. A correct histogram implementation that extends left from every right endpoint and recomputes the running minimum completes every tier in O(N^3) time, returns the closed-form count [N(N+1)/2]^2, and is rejected by scaling rather than a safety cap.
